TextENGNew: After cooling off a bit inside the restaurant, little by little, I realized I was still on edge.
My body sort of aches a little. Maybe I went a little too crazy trying to save Mion, I mean Shion.
Mion, who had changed into her waitress uniform, brought me two iced coffees.
``Here you go. Iced coffee, on the house.@k@vS19/06/660600101. Just bring this coupon with you to the register and it'll be no charge.``
I didn't have a reward in mind when I did what I did... but I may as well accept Shion's good will.
``Glug... glug...``
My throat was parched after putting up that surprisingly good fight. I can feel the cold from the iced coffee hitting my internal organs.
``Thanks a lot for just now, Kei-chan.@k@vS19/06/660600103. I didn't expect you to be so strong.@k@vS19/06/660600104. You felt really dependable.``
Mion stared at me with a dreamy look in her eyes. Her sincere eyes startled me, making me hastily avert my eyes.
``No, I was honestly scared, too.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16760. But you were in serious danger...@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16770. So I decided to give it my all.``
``You're so cool, Kei-chan!@k@vS19/06/660600106. It's a good thing to have that little bit of humility!``
I know she's just flattering me, but I don't mind.
``If you're ever in trouble or if bad people pick a fight with you again, just call me.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16790. I'll come rescue you.``
``Really?``
``Yeah.``
``It's a pinky promise, then.``
Shion smiles cheerfully and extends her slender pinky finger to me. I feel a bit nervous as I entwine her finger with my own.
``It's a pinky promise.@k@vS19/06/660600110. If you lie...``
``If I lie...?``
``If you lie, I'll split your skull until your brains spill out.♪``
``Until my brain spills out...``
``And that's a promise!``
Mion forced me to make this disturbing promise, then proceeded to smile sweetly with the most innocent, guileless face in the world.
``So you'll come rescue me if I'm ever in trouble~!@k@vS19/06/660600115. I sure hope that trouble comes soon~☆``
``Hey, now. I'm not gonna last if you decide to turn into a habitual damsel in distress.``
``Hmm, that's true.@k@vS19/06/660600117. It might be fun to see you break your promise so I can split your skull and spill your brains.``
Mion says, while petting my head as if evaluating its worth. ...I'd better keep this promise, I guess...
``You don't seem to have much brain in here, though.``
``Hey now~.``
``Ha no, just kidding.@k@vS19/06/660600120. Kei-chan, thanks a lot for today.``
Mion gives me a slight bow and smiles.
``You've worked so hard today, Kei-chan. You're probably hungry.@k@vS19/06/660600122. Would you care for some pancakes?``
I did consider being considerate. But that's so out of character for me that I decided to just be honest. That's my own way of being considerate.
``They'd better be good, though.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16860. I'm pretty finnicky when it comes to pancakes.``
``Ahahahaha!@k@vS19/06/660600124. Rest assured.@k@vS19/06/660600125. Our pancakes are quite well received.``
Mion orders some pancakes from a passing waitress.
Pretty weird for a waitress to take an order from another waitress, though...
``...Wait a sec, weren't you supposed to be on your shift, Mion? Are you sure it's alright for you to be loafing around chatting?``

``Well, when I told my uncle that you saved me when I was getting harrassed by those delinquents, he told me to reward you☆@k@vS19/06/660600127. So let's just say we have the go sign from the manager.``
``I bet you just want to use me as an excuse to skip out on work.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16880. Looks like our waitress has gone delinquent, too.``
``You got me.@k@vS19/06/660600129. ...Ahahahahaha!``
By the time the pancakes she ordered arrived, we were already having a friendly conversation.
``But you were so manly earlier, Kei-chan☆@k@vS19/06/660600131. You went all Bruce Lee on them...``
``...What're you planning?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16900. Knowing you, you're trying to lift me up with flattery just to bring me back down.``
``Bring you back down...?@k@vS19/06/660600133. Why...?``
Mion tilted her head, unable to understand the true meaning behind my words.
Ah crap... I've been talking as if she's the usual ``Mion.``
The person in front of me right now is her younger sister, ``Shion``. I should just go along with her act until she admits herself that it's all a ruse. That's what friends are for.
``Ah, sorry.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16920. I forgot you're not Mion.``
``I don't blame you.@k@vS19/06/660600135. We do look the same.``
``Exactly the same.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16940. But you're the exact opposite on the inside.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16950. Mion would've made short work of two or three thugs.``
``That's not true!@k@vS19/06/660600137. My sister, she...``
``Ah, sorry.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16970. I guess it's rude to be implying a girl is violent or has super strength.``
``My sister, she... She...@k@vS19/06/660600139. She could take on twenty or thirty thugs if she wanted to!``
``T-That's the part you're trying to correct me on...?``
Ignoring my dumbfounded expression, Mion starts munching on her pancakes.
Though I'm not sure what to think about how elegantly she places her hand to her lips as she chews...
``Delicious☆``
She smilingly says with some whipped cream stuck to her lip. I can't help but burst into laughter.
``What, what?@k@vS19/06/660600142. Why are you laughing~~~??``
``Damn, Shion. I never knew you were Santa Claus.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17000. Hehehe.``
``Huh? Huh?@k@vS19/06/660600144. Me, like Santa?``
``You've got a whole mustache around your mouth.``
She hurriedly pulls out a powder case from her pocket and looks into the mirror.
``Goodness!@k@vS19/06/660600148. You're so mean, Kei-chan!@k@vS19/06/660600149. Telling a maiden she has a beard~~!!``
This kind of pure reaction would have been unthinkable if she had been ``Mion``.
It gave me a fresh kind of excitement. If I get to see her make these kinds of feminine expressions, maybe it's not so bad if Mion pretends to be ``Shion`` once in a while.
Though obviously, it would be best if Mion would just show us her feminine side while staying true to herself.
``Hypothetically, okay? Are you listening?``
``Ah, sorry. Yeah, I'm listening.``

``This is just an hypothetical question, okay?@k@vS19/06/500600081. Both me and my sister are in trouble, okay?@k@vS19/06/500600082. We're dangling off the side of a cliff.@k@vS19/06/500600083. Which one of us do you save?@k@vS19/06/500600084. You can only save one.``
She wasn't saying it to tease me, but had a playful tone behind her voice.
``Th-That's not a nice question...!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17030. I want to save you both... but I can't do that, right?``
``Right.@k@vS19/06/500600086. You can only save either Shion or Mion.@k@vS19/06/500600087. Who do you save?``
...If it were Mion, I don't think she'd be in that situation in the first place, as it's something she could easily get out of herself.
But...
If Mion got into trouble, would I really be able to just ignore her...?
My answer after thinking on it a little was...
``Mion.``
My decisive answer makes Mion blush, yet she peers into my eyes with feigned composure.
``Because Mion is my friend.``
``Friend?``

``Yeah.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17070. She's is my friend that I see every day and constantly have fun with when doing club.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17080. I think it's natural for me to go help her immediately if she's in trouble.``
``A... Ah...@k@vS19/06/660600154. So that's what you mean.``

``Besides, if I save Mion first, the two of us can then come save you.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17100. Me and Mion are the strongest combination you can think of...!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17110. We'd have you rescued in no time.``
``...Ah, that makes sense.@k@vS19/06/660600156. A-Ahahaha...``
Shion smiled awkwardly while still blushing a little.
``...Hm?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17130. What's up?``
``...No, it's nothing.@k@vS19/06/660600158. I guess you and sis are just the strongest combination.@k@vS19/06/660600159. Mhm.@k@vS19/06/660600160. Ahahaha...``
I'm not sure what Shion was finding so funny, but she kept on smiling and laughing.
...If it were Mion, I don't think she'd be in that situation in the first place, as it's something she could easily get out of herself.
...But what about the normal, frail Shion?@k I guess... I'd have no choice.
``It's not my sister, right?``
If Mion and Shion were different people, I suppose it would come to that.
I couldn't confirm nor deny it.
...She should have been smiling, but her gaze was locked firmly to mine.
``In other words, that's it, isn't it?@k@vS19/06/500600090. My sister is...@k@vS19/06/500600091. ...huh, ...ehehehe!@k@vS19/06/500600092. Sorry, I messed up what I was trying to say.``
Shion was trying to talk in a light-hearted manner, but I felt that there was something more behind her words.
Was Mion trying to tell me something through Shion?
Not being able to put a finger on exactly what it was was vexing.
Shion, to hide her embarrassment, turned the conversation around.
``More importantly, just now...@k@vS19/06/500600094. Were you surprised?``

``Of course I was!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17150. If it were Rena or Satoko that would have been one thing,@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17160. but for all those people, young and old to gather...@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17170. They were all from Hinamizawa, right?``

``Yeah, that's right.@k@vS19/06/500600096. Everybody in Hinamizawa is pretty close-knit.@k@vS19/06/500600097. An enemy of one is the enemy of all.@k@vS19/06/500600098. Nobody is going to look on from the sidelines.@k@vS19/06/500600099. ...Ehehe, they're a pretty reliable group of residents.``
``...If somebody is being picked on, then everybody unites to get rid of the bully.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17190. It kind of sounds like the mafia or the yakuza's brand of unity!``

``You shouldn't say something like that.@k@vS19/06/500600101. It's something you should be thankful for.@k@vS19/06/500600102. You were saved by that unity, weren't you?@k@vS19/06/500600103. Never forget to show your appreciation!``
I half-heartedly agreed.
I knew full well I should be appreciative.
But still... It's quite impressive how quickly Tomita and Okamura got so many people together in such a small amount of time.
Though I'm even more impressed with the fact that the group of helpers contained a number of adult strangers, too. If we were in the city, they'd definitely overlook the incident or ignore it.
``Everybody really is close-knit, aren't they?``

``...Maybe it's because of tradition?@k@vS19/06/500600105. Hinamizawa has been in danger of becoming a ghost town on several occasions.@k@vS19/06/500600106. There's been a history of the villagers uniting together each time to fight for the village's continued existence.``
``For example~... Kei-chan, did you know about the Hinamizawa Dam Project?``
Hinamizawa Dam Project?
Didn't you tell me this exact story before? ...Is what I was about to say, but I decide to just shake my head.
This is ``Shion``, not Mion, so I have to align my response accordingly.
``About ten years ago, there was a sudden proposal to build a dam here, which would have submerged Hinamizawa underwater.``
``Oh, that story. I think I heard my dad talk about that...@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17220. But I'm pretty sure that plan was cancelled, right?``
``We made them cancel it.@k@vS19/06/500600110. Everybody banded together!@k@vS19/06/500600111. So that was a well-earned victory.``
That sounded pretty much like the story I heard.
The protest intensified to the point where it was featured in newspapers and magazines.@k ...As a result, the plan was suspended.
``The whole story with the dam apparently started before I was born.@k@vS19/06/500600113. At first, the proposal was only for exploratory purposes, or a small dam to control erosion.``
But, then the cat was let out of the bag...
If it were completed it would have been the biggest dam in Japan. Not just Hinamizawa, but several villages upstream would have been submerged as well.
The protests immediately began.
Petitions to cancel or relocate the project were drafted and submitted to the Diet.
They even went so far as to go to the Ministry of Construction in Tokyo to hand over a direct appeal to the Minister.

The previous landowner sued the government, stating there were inconsistencies in the purchase agreement and the transaction should be nullified.@k Owners of yet unacquired land split their properties, increasing the number of landowners in order to stifle the project.

``It was all very precious when the land acquisition was still about money.@k@vS19/06/500600115. Eventually, they started relying on eminent domain in order to seize land.@k@vS19/06/500600116. It started at that point.@k@vS19/06/500600117. The riot police began to get violent.``
``Riot police... You mean the police?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17240. Why would they act violent!?``

``They punched.@k@vS19/06/500600119. They kicked!@k@vS19/06/500600120. There was a time I was hit.@k@vS19/06/500600121. Right around here I think.@k@vS19/06/500600122. My skin split open and a whole lot of blood spilled out.``
Saying that, Shion indicated her temple by poking at it.
``Wh-What happened to the police?``
Filing a complaint against the riot police for police brutality would seem kind of strange for some reason.
Naturally they wouldn't pay heed to something like that.
You wouldn't be able to establish proof on who exactly hit you, and they could justify their actions by saying you were interfering with police duties.

``My Nana went off like a firework.@k@vS19/06/500600124. After that it was amazing!@k@vS19/06/500600125. Like a full-scale war.@k@vS19/06/500600126. We weren't just going to sit by and idly file complaints.@k@vS19/06/500600127. We went on the offensive.``
First, in order to call attention to the government, they filed a temporary injunction in court.
Then, in order to gain public support, they called in prominent scientists to state that Hinamizawa was a valuable nature preserve.

They pressured the prefectural and municipal assemblies, saying that the prefectural governor ignored his constituents when he approved the project, and demanded his resignation. They completely and thoroughly denounced him.
Naturally, in Hinamizawa, a ferocious conflict worthy of being called the ``Dam War`` began.
In order to suppress the police's brutality, they coordinated with the network channels and exposed the violence of the riot squad members to the public.

On top of that, they put together a special exposé themed around the government repressing the citizens, and aired it nationally.@k It worked wonders.@k Following that, the SWAT teams had their hands cuffed.
Day after day, the petitions and demonstrations continued. Propaganda was used to help garner support.

The circle of support gradually expanded outwards from Hinamizawa...@k Either that bore fruit, or the government finally decided against it.@k It was announced that the Dam Project was indefinitely suspended just a few years ago.

``We did everything we could.@k@vS19/06/500600129. The entire village banded together and fought.@k@vS19/06/500600130. At that time, we were desperate... but now that it's over it's actually become a pretty good memory.@k@vS19/06/500600131. ...The villagers' feelings of solidarity and unity still haven't faded.``
Shion said that as she focused off into the distance.
I felt that those eyes weren't filled with anguish, but rather, a sense of pride.
``That kind of solidarity... is pretty nice.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17270. You don't see it too often.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17280. Bridging the generation gap and unifying the region.``
``I think so too.@k@vS19/06/500600133. The Dam Project was a trial. I think that just the fact we were able to overcome it is huge.``
The villagers, prepared to defend their homeland to the death.@k The sense of solidarity that fostered.
...It might seem impudent to say this, but... I was a little jealous.
If I had been in Hinamizawa when the protest against the dam was going on, I might have been able to share in that sense of solidarity.

``Kei-chan, you weren't here at the time, so I don't think you can fully feel the solidarity in the village.@k@vS19/06/500600135. ...But everybody shares it.@k@vS19/06/500600136. Thoroughly.@k@vS19/06/500600137. Even with somebody who just moved here like you, Kei-chan.``
...She couldn't have been more right.
So many people got together to help me out when I just moved here.@k ...Even though they were strangers whose names I didn't even know.
...A hot feeling began welling up inside of me.
When I lived in the city, I didn't even know my own neighbors.@k I thought that was natural.@k But... here, that was an absurd and pathetic thing.
Even though I thought of them as strangers... all the other villagers viewed me as a comrade.
Happiness and warmth...@k I was acutely aware of those feelings as they gradually welled up inside of me.
``Sonozaki-sa~n.@k@vS19/00/waitA50002. The manager wants you to work the floor.``
A more senior waitress waved her hand and called out to Shion.@k ...It seemed like it was time for work.
``Ah, okay! I'm co~ming!@k@vS19/06/500600139. Sorry.@k@vS19/06/500600140. Looks like I have to get to work now.``
``It's fine.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17300. Thanks for hanging out with me, it was fun.``
``...Oh ...Are you going home?``
``Yeah.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17320. My mom gets fussy if I'm not home by dinner time.``
It seemed Shion wanted to say something, but she swallowed her words.@k Like we hadn't talked enough, that kind of feeling.
Looking at that expression, I regretted saying something that had disappointed Mion like that.
I was about to say that I could stay for a little bit longer, when Shion got up from her seat.
``Here.@k@vS19/06/500600143. If you use the coupon it should cover the pancakes as well.``
Saying that, she showed me a coupon booklet as she tore out a few sheets and handed them to me.
``Convenient, isn't it?@k@vS19/06/500600145. It's a perk I get on top of my salary.``
``I-It's okay.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17340. I can pay for the pancakes myself.``
``Hey hey~.@k@vS19/06/500600147. Being so reserved doesn't fit you, Kei-chan.@k@vS19/06/500600148. If I were my sister you would have gladly let me pay for it!``
She said as she laughed, gently stopping me from opening my wallet.
Being told so with such an encouraging smile really resounded with me.
``Sonozaki-sa~n. Sorry, could you take care of the register~!``
``Ah, yes! Right away!``
Later! Today was fun.@k Saying that, Shion smiled one more time at me.
``Oh, Mion!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17360. Thanks a lot for today. I owe you one.``
``If you really think that, then return the favor.@k@vS19/06/500600151. I'm looking forward to it!``
After I said it, I realized I mistakenly called her Mion.
I didn't know if she realized it or not.
Lazing around and watching television after dinner was part of my daily routine.
It might seem like a waste at first glance, but you could say it was an important time when I was able to accrue knowledge of everything from politics to economics to various trivia.
After dinner was valuable time well spent while the brain was at its most supplied with nutrients.
``You idiot! It's obvious that Tokyo Tower is taller!!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17380. Ahhh!!``
Today I tested my knowledge of trivia by watching my weekly quiz show.
Sitting in front of the television, I was able to get a lot of the answers right.@k ...But if I were actually up on stage, I'd probably fail miserably.
``Keiichi~.@k@vS19/00/502700002. Phone call from Sonozaki-san.``
``Okay~.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17400. ...Sonozaki?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17410. That's Mion!``
It was a little late for her to be calling.@k ...I had a bad feeling about this.@k I had a hunch it was something to do with club activities.
She was probably going to inform me about what we were doing tomorrow.
...This *was* Mion we're talking about.
She might even go so far as to say we're doing club activities right now, so hurry up and come over.@k By the way, it was 8 pm.
``Hello?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17430. No way we're having a club battle right now!``
``Huh!? ...That's not it... I mean...``
It was Mion, but it was a very un-Mion-like way of talking.
...Huh? Could it be...?
``S-Sorry.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17450. Could it be you're not Mion... but Shion?``
``That's right.@k@vS19/06/500600154. ...Ummm... Good evening. I'm sorry for calling so late.``
For Mion, this would have been an ill-fittingly polite way of talking.@k But since it was Shion, it was natural.
...Even though they were both the same person.
With a dry smile, I enjoyed that mysterious feeling.
``No, it's fine.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17470. What's up?``
``Kei-chan, do you like sweets, like cakes or desserts?``
There was no way I hated them. I'm an unabashed glutton!
``That's great.@k@vS19/06/500600158. Actually, there's a new dessert contest this summer.``
Looks like they have a new dessert menu every season.
So they were hiring taste-testers for potential desserts.
``The desserts at Angel Mort have a good reputation.@k@vS19/06/500600160. It's pretty difficult to get accepted as a taste-tester.@k@vS19/06/500600161. ...I'll get right to the point. Ta-da~☆.``
``You say 'Ta-da~' but I can't see over the phone. Still... could it be...``
``That's right!@k@vS19/06/500600163. I have a Taste-Testing Ticket right here.@k@vS19/06/500600164. If you don't mind sweets, how about it?``
``When you say 'how about it,' you basically mean...@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17500. With that ticket I can eat all the new desserts I want!?``
They say to beware of honeypots... but this is sweeter than any pot of honey!
All-you-can-eat free dessert? No way!

``If you're okay with that, I'll register you as a taste-tester.@k@vS19/06/500600166. When you come to the restaurant tomorrow, just give the person in charge your name.@k@vS19/06/500600167. Then everything'll work out.``
``When you say everything'll work out... you mean all-you-can-eat!?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17520. For free!?``
``Yeah, it's free.@k@vS19/06/500600169. There's quite a bit, so I recommend you come hungry.``
This was such a delectable opportunity it was almost scary.
...This was really Shion, right?
It wasn't Mion posing as Shion in order to bait me into a trap, was it...?
...What am I saying...@k They're the same person.
``Yeah, yeah.@k@vS19/06/500600171. I know exactly what you're thinking, Kei-chan.@k@vS19/06/500600172. You're thinking this is too good to be true, right?``
``Eep. I mean, I would never...``

``*snort*!@k@vS19/06/500600174. Hee hee hee hee...@k@vS19/06/500600175. I heard from my sister but... you're really somebody who can't tell a lie.@k@vS19/06/500600177. I'm not averse to somebody like that. ...Hehehe!``
Shion laughed with a voice that sounded a lot like how Mion would laugh.

``It's not like I was intending on it...@k@vS19/06/500600178. But it just so happens that my shift ends early tomorrow.@k@vS19/06/500600179. ...If it's not a bother, I thought maybe we could spend a little time together after I'm done.``
``Hmmm... your shift ends early tomorrow?``
``Yeah.@k@vS19/06/500600181. So while you take your time eating dessert I'll finish up.``
``Well... I didn't have any plans anyway.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI17560. I don't mind hanging out with you for a bit.``
``It's not like we have to go anywhere.@k@vS19/06/500600183. I was thinking we could cool off in the evening while we take a walk.``
There was no reason for me to refuse.
... Out of courtesy, I might as well take her up on her offer.
``By the way, Kei-chan... You and I have been meeting up every day, haven't we?``
``...Now that you say it, I guess we have.``
``Since you said okay, we have an excuse to meet again tomorrow.``
Huh??@k Wh-What was Mion saying??
``Ahahahahaha! Kei-chan, your voice just cracked.@k@vS19/06/500600187. What's the matter?@k@vS19/06/500600188. *snicker*``
It wasn't a video-phone, but she could tell I was beet-red!
``Well then, you should definitely come tomorrow!@k@vS19/06/500600190. I'll take my leave here. Good night.``
``G... Good night~.``
Shion, finished with what she had called to say, ended the conversation without any chit-chat.
When I returned to the living room after hanging up the phone, the TV was already off and my mom was sleeping in the rocking chair.
Not feeling like turning the TV back on, I went back upstairs and returned to my room.
``I've only been receiving favors from Shion, haven't I...?``
She brought me a bento, and saved me when I got involved with those thugs.
She was supposed to be a different person, so I could thank Mion at school.@k ...Come to think of it, she'd probably just say she'll pass it on to her sister.
I have to thank Shion directly...
Tomorrow, I'll have to repay her somehow.
